arts.ttl: Ian Maatsen makes 'exceptional' Aston Villa admission ahead of huge Man City clash
arts.sum: Ian Maatsen acknowledges that squad rotation at Aston Villa is to be expected given the team's "exceptional" quality, but he now feels more comfortable within Unai Emery’s system. Ian Maatsen scored his second goal of the season for Aston Villa in the 4-1 win over Newcastle on Saturday

arts.ttl: Man Utd & Man City battle PSG for €80m Ligue 1 star
